svg.text: ▌ UNCLASSIFIED ▌ IRONFORGE MDMP SIMULATION — TRAINING AID ONLY ▌ NOT FOR OPERATIONAL USE ▌ UNCLASSIFIED ▌
2d Brigade Combat Team defends sector NORTHWEST NLT 042200APR26 to deny enemy access to OBJECTIVE RAPTOR and retain
freedom of action for CORPS counterattack, on order. (FM 6-0 §9-47)
to deny enemy access to OBJ RAPTOR
and retain CORPS freedom of action
1x FA BN (DS), 1x EN BN. Avn Bde
Defeat enemy BTG attack in depth
Synchronize fires with scheme of maneuver
Defeat enemy BTG in engagement areas before penetrating main battle area
Retain OBJECTIVE RAPTOR through culmination of enemy attack
Mass fires in engagement areas before enemy closes to direct fire range. Preserve reserve for decisive counterattack. Protect flanks.
▌ UNCLASSIFIED ▌ IRONFORGE MDMP SIMULATION — TRAINING AID ONLY ▌ NOT FOR OPERATIONAL USE ▌ UNCLASSIFIED ▌
